{{Quote|We need air support! Locate and destroy their main base.|A Tof warrior scrambles their starfighters.|<ref name="SW107" />}}
The '''Tof starfighter''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] built for the [[Tof/Legends|Tof]] armada.

==Characteristics==
It was designed with a backwards-sloping [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]] that was flanked by two weapons pontoons. Twin engines were mounted to the undercarriage of the cockpit and the design was similar in performance to the [[A-9 Vigilance interceptor]].<ref name="TUR">''[[The Unknown Regions]]''</ref> The starfighters were all painted blue in color.<ref name="SW107" />

==History==
[[File:Tof_fighter2.jpg|thumb|left|120px|Starfighter undercarriage.]]
All Tof capital ships in general had at least one starfighter squadron each.<ref name="TUR" />

The [[Tof bulk cruiser|bulk cruiser]] ''[[Merriweather]]'' carried at least one squadron of these fighters as part of its complement. During the [[Battle of Saijo]], they were requested to provide air cover to the ground forces under attack, but when the [[Alliance of Free Planets]] jumped its forces into the system, the Tof fighters were forced to engage [[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gold Squadron]] and the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], led by [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]. Almost half of the starfighters were destroyed before the ''Merriweather'' surrendered to the superior Alliance forces.<ref name="SW107" />

==Appearances==
